mapper.select: SELECT OPTIONS FROM LEARNING_QUESTION WHERE LESSON_ID = #{lessonId} AND question_id = 'LV1_CH001_LSN001_Q001'

SELECT CHAPTER_NAME ,LL.LESSON_NAME ,SUBSTRING(QUESTION_ID,4) AS questionId FROM LEARNING_LESSON LL LEFT OUTER JOIN LEARNING_CHAPTER LC ON LL.CHAPTER_ID = LC.CHAPTER_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN LEARNING_QUESTION LQ ON LL.LESSON_ID = LQ.LESSON_ID WHERE LL.LESSON_ID = #{lessonId}
SELECT QUESTION_TYPE ,QUESTION_TEXT , OPTIONS , ANSWER FROM LEARNING_QUESTION WHERE LESSON_ID = #{lessonId} AND QUESTION_ID !='LV1_CH001_LSN001_Q001'
SELECT RESULT_SEQ , USER_SEQ , LESSON_ID , STARTED_AT , FINISHED_AT FROM USER_QUESTION_RESULT WHERE USER_SEQ = #{userSeq} AND LESSON_ID = #{lessonId}
